chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الصَّلَاةِ فِي مَسْجِدِ مِنًى وَ مَنْ يَجِبُ عَلَيْهِ التَّقْصِيرُ وَ التَّمَامُ بِمِنًى
chapter_title.en: Chapter 197 – The Salaat in the Masjid of Mina, and the one upon whom is Obligated the shortening (of the Salaat) and the full, in Mina

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/212)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/212)
text: صَلِّ سِتَّ رَكَعَاتٍ فِي مَسْجِدِ مِنًى فِي أَصْلِ الصَّوْمَعَةِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Pray six Cycles in Masjid of Mina at the base of the minaret’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn abu Hamzah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Perform six Rak‘at Salat (prayer) in Masjid of Mina’ in the original al-Sawma‘ah (the structure near the minaret). (Fatwa explains h 4-5 above)
